personal.name: Kapil Chauhan
personal.title: Software Engineer
personal.about: I'm a passionate Software Engineer with 2+ years of experience building scalable backend systems, microservices, and cloud-native applications. Currently a Founding Software Engineer at BlueFetch Robotics, where I architect backend services for robot telemetry and fleet management. I love solving complex problems, optimizing performance, and exploring the intersection of software and robotics. I've solved 400+ DSA problems on LeetCode & GFG.

experience.description: Building the backend infrastructure for a next-generation robotics startup from the ground up.
points: Developed backend services using Java & Spring Boot for robot telemetry ingestion & status tracking
Implemented a Kafka-based telemetry pipeline to process robot metrics such as motor current, power consumption & cleaning progress
Containerized backend services with Docker & deployed microservices on Kubernetes
Built monitoring dashboards using Prometheus & Grafana to visualize 10+ telemetry metrics
Integrated ROS nodes with backend services for communication between robot components & cloud systems
Built a control web interface using Next.js to trigger robot actions via ROS
Supported early-stage robotics development through system demos & technical documentation

experience.description: Delivered critical backend microservices for Japan Airlines' post-booking platform and built PoC AI solutions.
points: Built Japan Airlines' new post-booking platform from scratch, delivering 13+ backend microservices
Developed a BFF & status-check microservices with a 2-retry mechanism, achieving 100% completion-or-fail guarantee
Implemented a rule-engine microservice with 99% automated test coverage, reducing manual QA effort by executing 1000+ rules under 5 minutes
Optimized API performance by 40% through SQL tuning, indexing, Redis-based caching, reducing latency by 60ms
Reduced JAR size by 40% & improved AWS Lambda cold-start latency by 95ms
Built PoC AI solutions including an FAQ chatbot & voice-call automation using RAG, LLMs, vector DB
Delivered robust code quality with 85%+ JUnit test coverage

experience.description: Led end-to-end development of a full-stack web platform for an early-stage startup.
points: Led end-to-end development of a full-stack web platform
Developed a micro-blogging platform with dynamic pagination
Built a custom payment gateway API that enabled 15L+ rs in donations & onboarded 100+ users
Developed an interactive map-based navigation system
Engineered backend architecture for authentication, role-based access control, & database ERD design
Deployed applications on Vercel with Cloudinary & AWS for media storage

projects.name: Robot Telemetry Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time monitoring dashboard for robot fleet management. Visualizes 10+ telemetry metrics including motor current, power consumption, and cleaning progress using Prometheus & Grafana integrated with Kafka streams.

projects.name: AI FAQ Chatbot
projects.description: RAG-based intelligent chatbot for Japan Airlines customer support. Leverages LLMs and vector databases to provide accurate, context-aware answers to frequently asked questions, reducing support load significantly.

projects.name: Custom Payment Gateway
projects.description: Full-stack payment gateway API enabling seamless donations. Processed 15L+ in transactions and onboarded 100+ users with secure authentication, transaction tracking, and real-time notifications.

projects.name: Micro-Blog Platform
projects.description: Full-stack micro-blogging platform with dynamic pagination, rich text editing, user profiles, follow system, and interactive map-based navigation. Deployed on Vercel with Cloudinary for media management.
